tool.name: katana_crawl
tool.description: Crawl and spider a web application using Katana to discover all URLs, endpoints, JavaScript files, API routes, and forms. Use this BEFORE vulnerability scanning to build a full attack surface map. Essential for discovering hidden endpoints that manual browsing misses.

parameter.name: depth
parameter.description: Crawl depth - how many links deep to follow (default: 3)

parameter.name: js_crawl
parameter.description: Also parse JavaScript files for hidden endpoints and API routes (default: true)

parameter.name: headless
parameter.description: Use headless browser for JavaScript-heavy Single Page Applications (Angular, React, Vue). Renders JS before crawling to discover dynamically loaded endpoints. (default: false)

parameter.name: scope_in_domain
parameter.description: Stay within the target domain to avoid crawling external sites (default: true)

returns.description: Discovered endpoints with: - endpoints: list of discovered URLs with method, status, content_type - total_found: count of unique endpoints - by_type: breakdown by content type (html, js, api, etc.)
